seoTitle: Peranga vs Peregian Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Peranga and Peregian Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Peranga vs Peregian Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Peranga and Peregian Beach.
heading: Peranga vs Peregian Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Peranga, Queensland and Peregian Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Peregian Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Peranga (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Peranga or Peregian Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Peranga has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Peregian Beach scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Peranga scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Peregian Beach scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Peranga or Peregian Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Peregian Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
